• Interactive Magic 8 Ball with 3D WebGL particle effects and shake animation on query
  • Supports 5 selectable response personalities: Friendly, Mean, Silly, Dramatic, Roast Me
  • Fetches short AI answers via OpenRouter API, auto-reverts to default after 45 seconds
    onclick="askQuestion()"
    marked.parse(markdownText)

This web app simulates a digital Magic 8 Ball with dynamic visual effects. Users input questions, select a response tone, and receive AI-generated answers via the OpenRouter API. The interface includes shake animations, 3D particle backgrounds, and resets to its default state automatically after 45 seconds.
